response:
Hi [Recipient's Name],  

Thanks for the update. As per the tracking, the estimated delivery is 6/27, and the transit period seems quite long. It may be due to the long holiday period here from 6/22 to 6/25. I will continue to follow up and reach out for your support where needed.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
Uni-Eastern Mfg. Co. Ltd | Taiwan, Taipei #114 | 2F, No. 16, Lane 35, Ji-Hu Road.  
Tel: [Phone Number] / Mobile: [Phone Number] / Skype: [Skype ID] / WeChat: [WeChat ID]  

---

**How to reply to this email:**  
You can respond by acknowledging the update and confirming that you will monitor the delivery status. You may also express willingness to provide further support if needed. For example:

> Thank you for the update. I understand the delivery is expected on 6/27, and I appreciate your note about the holiday affecting the transit time. I will keep an eye on the tracking and reach out if any further action is required. Please let me know if there is anything else I can assist with.  

Let me know if you'd like a more formal or informal version of the reply!
